change_description.description: A summary of changes made to the component.

data.description: The raw data or content of the component.

date_created.description: The date and time when the component was created.

description.description: A detailed explanation of what the component does.

encrypted.description: Indicates if the component is encrypted.

id.description: The unique identifier of the component.

kms_key_id.description: The ID of the KMS key used for encryption, if applicable.

owner.description: The AWS account ID of the component owner.

platform.description: The platform for which the component is intended, such as Windows or Linux.

supported_os_versions.description: The operating system versions that the component supports.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the component.

version.description: The version number of the component.
